holdings.infoBox: XLU is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are NextEra Energy stock at 12.97%, The Southern Company at 7.40%, Duke Energy at 6.99%, Constellation Energy at 6.20%, and American Electric Power Company at 5.04%.

overview.description: The State Street Utilities Select Sector SPDR ETF (XLU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Utilities Select Sector index, a market-cap-weighted index of US utilities stocks drawn exclusively from the S&P 500. XLU was launched on Dec 16, 1998 and is issued by State Street.
